title: Chapter 27
text: Can i ask you a HUGE favor? Would you be willing to leave me a review? I would be so grateful as one positive review on Amazon is like buying the book a hundred times. Your support is the lifeblood of Indie authors and provides us with the feedback we need to give the readers exactly what they want! I read each and every review. They mean the world to me! So thank you in advance, and happy reading! Click to Review
